LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF JEFF CHANDLER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF HIS MOTION. THE COURT DOES NOT CONSIDER THE EVIDENCE FILED IN REPLY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
